sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَكْتُ فِي جَوْلَةٍ سِيَاحِيَّةٍ بِالْحَافِلَةِ لِاكْتِشَافِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pridružio sam se turističkoj autobus-turi za upoznavanje grada.
sentences.translationEn: I joined a bus sightseeing tour to explore the city.

sentences.arabic: رَكِبْنَا حَافِلَةً كَبِيرَةً مَكْشُوفَةَ السَّقْفِ مَعَ مَجْمُوعَةٍ مِنَ السُّيَّاحِ.
sentences.translation: Ukrcali smo se u veliki otvoreni autobus zajedno s grupom turista.
sentences.translationEn: We boarded a large open-top bus together with a group of tourists.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمُرْشِدُ السِّيَاحِيُّ يَشْرَحُ تَارِيخَ كُلِّ مَكَانٍ بِصَوْتٍ وَاضِحٍ.
sentences.translation: Turistički vodič je jasnim glasom objašnjavao historiju svakog mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: The tour guide explained the history of each place in a clear voice.

sentences.arabic: تَوَقَّفْنَا أَمَامَ أَهَمِّ الْمَعَالِمِ وَالْتَقَطْنَا الصُّوَرَ.
sentences.translation: Zaustavljali smo se ispred najvažnijih znamenitosti i fotografirali se.
sentences.translationEn: We stopped in front of the main landmarks and took photos.

sentences.arabic: أَعْجَبَتْنِي الْجَوْلَةُ كَثِيرًا وَتَعَلَّمْتُ مَعْلُومَاتٍ جَدِيدَةً عَنِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tura mi se jako svidjela i naučio sam nove informacije o gradu.
sentences.translationEn: I really enjoyed the tour and learned new things about the city.
